title: print~
description: print out raw values of a signal

messages.description: signal block to print on terminal window
print one block on terminal window
sets and prints number of blocks on terminal window

arguments.description: symbol to distinct one [print~] from another

body: The print~ object takes a signal input and prints one or more blocks (or 'vectors') out when you send it a bang or a number. By default a block is 64 samples.
